name: Crazy Cake # 2
recipeIngredient: Powdered sugar (or frosting of your choice)
recipeInstructions:
1. For best results, prepare this cake the day before you intend to serve it to allow the flavors to mellow.
2. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
3. Generously grease an 8x8x2-inch square baking pan with shortening.
4. Sift together flour, sugar, cocoa, baking soda, and salt directly into the prepared baking pan.
5. Add water, corn oil, apple cider vinegar, and vanilla extract to the sifted ingredients in the pan.
6. Stir (do not beat) until the mixture is smooth and well combined.
7. Place the pan on the center shelf of the oven.
8. Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Let cool completely before sprinkling with powdered sugar (or frosting as desired).
